auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Apollo API key sent with the x-api-key header. Create it in Settings > Integrations > API Keys: https://docs.apollo.io/docs/create-api-key. The first-pass actions require a master API key.

actions.name: enrich_organization
actions.description: Enrich an Apollo organization by domain.

domain.description: The bare company domain used to enrich an Apollo organization.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Apollo organization enrichment request.

organization.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Apollo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for the Apollo organization enrichment request.

actions.name: enrich_person
actions.description: Enrich an Apollo person with the first-pass matching inputs.

hashedEmail.description: The hashed email used for Apollo person matching.

linkedinUrl.description: The LinkedIn profile URL used for Apollo person matching.

name.description: The full name used for Apollo person matching.

firstName.description: The first name used for Apollo person matching.

lastName.description: The last name used for Apollo person matching.

organizationName.description: The organization name paired with name-based person matching.

domain.description: The bare organization domain paired with person matching.

revealPersonalEmails.description: Whether Apollo should reveal personal-email data when available.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Apollo person enrichment request.

person.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Apollo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for the Apollo person enrichment request.

actions.name: get_api_usage_stats
actions.description: Retrieve Apollo API usage statistics for the current team and key.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

used.description: The number of credits already used.

limit.description: The credit limit for the current usage period.

remaining.description: The number of credits remaining in the current usage period.

credits.description: The normalized Apollo credit usage summary.

items.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Apollo.

endpoints.description: A list of arbitrary JSON objects returned by Apollo.

usagePeriodStart.description: The start timestamp of the current usage period.

usagePeriodEnd.description: The end timestamp of the current usage period.

raw.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Apollo.

usage.description: The normalized Apollo usage stats payload.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for the Apollo usage stats request.

actions.name: search_organizations
actions.description: Search Apollo organizations with the first-pass organization filters.

perPage.description: The number of records to request per page.

organizationIds.description: Apollo organization IDs used to scope the search.

organizationName.description: The organization name query used for partial company-name matching.

organizationLocations.description: The organization headquarters locations to include in the search.

excludedOrganizationLocations.description: The organization headquarters locations to exclude from the search.

organizationDomains.description: The bare company domains used to restrict the organization search.

organizationKeywordTags.description: The organization industry or specialization keywords used to refine the search.

organizationEmployeeRanges.description: The employee-count ranges expressed as Apollo 'min,max' strings.

organizationRevenueMin.description: The minimum annual revenue, in US dollars, used to refine the organization search.

organizationRevenueMax.description: The maximum annual revenue, in US dollars, used to refine the organization search.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Apollo organization search request.

items.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Apollo.

pagination.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Apollo.

items.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Apollo.

breadcrumbs.description: A list of arbitrary JSON objects returned by Apollo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for the Apollo organization search request.

actions.name: search_people
actions.description: Search Apollo people with the first-pass prospecting filters.

perPage.description: The number of records to request per page.

keywords.description: The Apollo keywords string used to refine the people search.

personTitles.description: The current job titles to include in the people search.

includeSimilarTitles.description: Whether Apollo should include titles similar to the supplied person titles.

organizationIds.description: The Apollo organization IDs used to scope the people search.

personLocations.description: The person locations to include in the search.

personSeniorities.description: The person seniority values to include in the search.

contactEmailStatus.description: The Apollo contact-email-status values to include.

organizationLocations.description: The organization headquarters locations used to refine the people search.

organizationDomains.description: The organization domains used to refine the people search.

organizationEmployeeRanges.description: The employee-count ranges expressed as Apollo 'min,max' strings.

organizationRevenueMin.description: The minimum annual revenue, in US dollars, used to refine the people search.

organizationRevenueMax.description: The maximum annual revenue, in US dollars, used to refine the people search.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the Apollo people search request.

items.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Apollo.

people.description: The matched Apollo people search results.

pagination.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Apollo.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for the Apollo people search request.
